title: °maia/factory/factories-registry.factory.json
description: Schema registry CoMap - maps schema namekeys (e.g., °maia/factory/todo.factory.json) to schema co-ids (co_z...). Stored in account.os.factories

additionalProperties.description: Schema namekey → schema co-id mapping (e.g., °maia/factory/todo.factory.json → co_z123...)
